scenario_meta.description: A large Japanese fantasy RPG guild with 100 regular guild members plus three JSON-defined protagonists; adventurers trade supplies, coordinate quests, train, heal, research, repair gear, mediate party friction, and respond to per-round generated task chains and guild incidents.
scenario_meta.simulation_objective: Run a 103-agent, 25-round guild interaction simulation with three always-active protagonists, JSON-driven per-round task/event generation, ordinary JSON actions first, optional LongLive only for visible body-cooperation interactions, and JSON-driven image generation when applicable.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Raid Commission Posted
extra_world_events.description: A frantic farmer just posted an urgent request regarding a goblin raid on the eastern outskirts. A party needs to be formed immediately.

extra_world_events.title: Unidentified Relic Discovered
extra_world_events.description: A scouting party returned with a glowing, humming stone from the ruins. It has been placed in the library for identification.

extra_world_events.title: Spilled Potion Crate
extra_world_events.description: A nervous rookie tripped in the warehouse, shattering a crate of minor healing potions. The sticky mess needs cleaning and the inventory must be recounted.

extra_world_events.title: Shattered Practice Dummy
extra_world_events.description: An overzealous mage completely obliterated a training dummy in the yard, sparking a loud argument with the martial classes waiting to practice.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Raid Party Recruited
extra_world_events.description: A party has been formed for the eastern goblin raid. They are currently gathering at the Strategy Table to finalize their approach and check supplies before departure.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Emits Arcane Pulse
extra_world_events.description: Initial research on the glowing stone triggered a mild arcane pulse. The library needs a barrier spell duet to safely continue the identification process.

extra_world_events.title: Loud Tavern Rumor
extra_world_events.description: A loud argument in the tavern corner reveals a rumor about a hidden treasure map piece found in recent goblin loot.

extra_world_events.title: Dropped Shield in Forge
extra_world_events.description: An apprentice blacksmith dropped a heavy commissioned shield, causing a noticeable dent. They need urgent help repairing it before the client arrives.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Raid Party Equipping
extra_world_events.description: The goblin raid party has finalized their strategy and is now drawing final rations and specialized gear from the warehouse before departing.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Safely Contained
extra_world_events.description: A successful spell duet has contained the relic's arcane pulse. The scholars have identified it and are ready to hand the artifact over.

extra_world_events.title: Injured Novice in Yard
extra_world_events.description: A novice lost their balance during a heavy drill and needs someone to rescue their footing and help them to the infirmary.

extra_world_events.title: Missing Clearance Stamp
extra_world_events.description: The official quest clearance stamp has gone missing from the front desk, delaying quest completion celebrations and payouts.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Raid Triumphant Return
extra_world_events.description: The raid party has returned victorious but exhausted. They are gathering at the Guild Hall to report their findings, hand over recovered loot, and celebrate.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Transferred for Archival
extra_world_events.description: The safely contained relic is being transferred to the Guild Hall's secure vault. Final documentation and reward payouts are ready for the involved scholars.

extra_world_events.title: Misplaced Reward Box
extra_world_events.description: In the excitement of the goblin raid's triumphant return, a small box of premium loot was accidentally left near the tavern kitchens instead of the secure vault.

extra_world_events.title: Restless Injured Familiar
extra_world_events.description: A scout's summoned hawk familiar is refusing treatment in the infirmary, fluttering around and knocking over carefully organized bandages and healing salves.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Boss Retaliation Posted
extra_world_events.description: Scout reports from the victorious raid indicate a goblin boss is planning retaliation. A high-priority commission has just been posted.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Twin Map Search
extra_world_events.description: Archiving the relic revealed references to a dormant twin artifact. Scholars are now cross-referencing ancient texts with regional maps to find it.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Party Dispute
extra_world_events.description: Two rival adventuring parties are arguing loudly at the quest board over who has the right to lead the vanguard against the goblin boss retaliation.

extra_world_events.title: Floating Spellbooks
extra_world_events.description: Residual mana from the recent relic research has caused several heavy spellbooks in the Arcane Library to float out of reach, frustrating the scholars.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Boss Vanguard Equipping
extra_world_events.description: The vanguard party for the goblin boss retaliation has been finalized. They are now at the forge rushing weapon repairs and requesting buffs before departure.

extra_world_events.title: Twin Relic Expedition Formed
extra_world_events.description: Scholars have pinpointed the dormant twin relic's location. An expedition team is gathering supplies at the warehouse and recruiting escorts for the journey.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Boss Vanguard Departs
extra_world_events.description: The fully equipped vanguard has departed to intercept the goblin boss. The guild is now coordinating backup support at the strategy table and awaiting initial scout reports.

extra_world_events.title: Twin Relic Expedition Departs
extra_world_events.description: The expedition team has secured their supplies and departed. They are requesting a final remote spell duet cast from the library to mask their tracks as they enter the ruin territory.

extra_world_events.title: Shattered Practice Dummy
extra_world_events.description: An overzealous recruit shattered a reinforced practice dummy, leaving dangerous splintered wood and metal across the sparring mats.

extra_world_events.title: Loud Tavern Rumor
extra_world_events.description: A drunken scout is loudly claiming the Goblin Boss has acquired a stolen guild artifact, causing a stir among the resting adventurers.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Boss Scout Report
extra_world_events.description: A wounded scout has stumbled into the guild hall carrying urgent coordinates of the goblin boss's ambush. Backup forces must deploy immediately.

extra_world_events.title: Twin Relic Seal Cipher Needed
extra_world_events.description: The expedition reached the ruins but encountered a magical seal. A messenger has returned requesting a specific translated cipher from the library to open it.

extra_world_events.title: Spilled Healing Potions
extra_world_events.description: In the rush to treat the wounded scout, a crate of healing potions was dropped in the infirmary, creating a slippery mess and a shortage of immediate supplies.

extra_world_events.title: Misplaced Clearance Reward
extra_world_events.description: A reward box meant for a returning party was misplaced in the warehouse, causing a minor argument between the quartermaster and the eager adventurers.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Boss Backup Deployment
extra_world_events.description: The backup squad has formed and is urgently reviewing the scout's ambush coordinates at the strategy table before rushing out to reinforce the vanguard.

extra_world_events.title: Twin Relic Cipher Courier Needed
extra_world_events.description: The library scholars have cracked the seal cipher. An urgent commission is now posted for a fast courier to deliver the translated scroll to the expedition team.

extra_world_events.title: Runaway Forge Sparks
extra_world_events.description: The rush to equip the goblin backup squad caused the forge bellows to overheat, scattering dangerous sparks and temporarily halting gear repairs.

extra_world_events.title: Premature Victory Toast
extra_world_events.description: A novice party is loudly celebrating a minor clearance in the tavern corner, annoying veterans trying to rest and sparking a mild dispute.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Boss Defeated, Wounded Return
extra_world_events.description: The combined vanguard and backup squads have returned victorious but heavily wounded. The infirmary is scrambling to treat the injured while processing the boss's loot.

extra_world_events.title: First Relic Secured
extra_world_events.description: The courier delivered the cipher, and the expedition team has teleported the first half of the Twin Relic back to the warehouse. It needs immediate inspection and secure storage.

extra_world_events.title: Missing Clearance Stamp
extra_world_events.description: In the chaos of processing the goblin boss loot, the official clearance stamp has gone missing from the quest board desk, delaying official rewards.

extra_world_events.title: Strange Mana Flicker
extra_world_events.description: The newly secured relic in the warehouse is causing strange mana flickers in the adjacent arcane library, disrupting spell research and causing books to float.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Raid Victory Feast
extra_world_events.description: With the wounded stabilized, the guild throws a hearty feast to celebrate the goblin boss's defeat. The cadre is busy distributing the hard-earned loot.

extra_world_events.title: Second Relic Coordinates Decoded
extra_world_events.description: By analyzing the first relic's mana signature, scholars have pinpointed the second half's location. A new expedition party must be formed immediately.

extra_world_events.title: Second Relic Expedition Departure
extra_world_events.description: The newly formed expedition party is gathering at the strategy table to finalize their route and check supplies before heading out to secure the second relic half.

extra_world_events.title: Post-Raid Gear Overhaul
extra_world_events.description: Following the goblin raid victory, adventurers are flooding the forge to repair their battered equipment, causing a massive backlog of armor and weapons that needs coordination.

extra_world_events.title: Misplaced Whetstone Crate
extra_world_events.description: The massive backlog at the forge has depleted sharpening supplies, but the reserve crate of whetstones is lost somewhere in the warehouse.

extra_world_events.title: Spooked Scout Familiar
extra_world_events.description: A scout's avian familiar is refusing to fly ahead for the relic expedition, agitated by lingering mana from the first relic.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Sealed Gate Encountered
extra_world_events.description: A scout has rushed back from the second relic expedition. They encountered a magically sealed gate and urgently need the first relic's mana signature to open it.

extra_world_events.title: Repaired Gear Ready for Vanguard
extra_world_events.description: The forge has finally cleared the repair backlog. Freshly polished armor and sharpened blades must be distributed to the recovering vanguard members in the yard.

extra_world_events.title: Spilled Ale on Quest Map
extra_world_events.description: A rowdy vanguard member celebrating their repaired gear accidentally knocked over a flagon of ale onto a crucial expedition map, blurring the route to the sealed gate.

extra_world_events.title: Scattered Scout Notes
extra_world_events.description: The scout who rushed back from the sealed gate dropped their hastily scribbled field notes near the strategy table, and a sudden draft blew the parchment pages everywhere.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Mana Crystal Charged
extra_world_events.description: Scholars in the Arcane Library have successfully extracted the first relic's mana signature into a portable crystal, which now needs to be rushed to the expedition.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Readiness Drill
extra_world_events.description: With their repaired gear distributed, the vanguard is conducting a heavy sparring drill in the yard to ensure their armor holds up before the next patrol.

extra_world_events.title: Minor Sparring Sprain
extra_world_events.description: A rookie vanguard member misjudged the weight of their newly repaired armor during the drill and twisted an ankle, needing a quick remedy in the infirmary.

extra_world_events.title: Residual Mana Anomaly
extra_world_events.description: The intense energy used to charge the relic's mana crystal has left residual magic in the air, causing several heavy reference books to float stubbornly out of reach.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Crystal Handoff
extra_world_events.description: The charged mana crystal must be handed over to the expedition leader at the strategy table before they march out to unseal the gate.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol Deployment
extra_world_events.description: Following successful gear drills, the vanguard is gathering at the quest board to receive their official patrol routes and final buffs before heading out.

extra_world_events.title: Mixed-up Patrol Routes
extra_world_events.description: Two vanguard squads are arguing over overlapping patrol routes near the quest board, delaying their official deployment.

extra_world_events.title: Humming Mana Crystal
extra_world_events.description: The charged mana crystal at the strategy table is emitting a piercing hum, distracting the expedition leader and requiring a quick dampening spell.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Departure to Sealed Gate
extra_world_events.description: With the mana crystal secured, the expedition party gathers at the warehouse to load final rations and supplies before marching out to the ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol: First Contact Report
extra_world_events.description: A vanguard scout has rushed back to the Guild Hall reporting initial contact with goblin skirmishers on the patrol route, requesting tactical coordination.

extra_world_events.title: Misplaced Expedition Rations
extra_world_events.description: During the chaotic loading of the expedition carts, a crate of specialized rations was misplaced, causing a brief panic among the quartermasters in the warehouse.

extra_world_events.title: Exhausted Vanguard Scout
extra_world_events.description: The scout who delivered the first contact report collapsed from exhaustion in the Guild Hall, needing immediate support before they can provide the full tactical details.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Remote Seal Analysis
extra_world_events.description: The expedition reached the ruins but the gate's seal is complex. Scholars at the strategy table are frantically cross-referencing maps to guide them via communication crystal.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol: Reinforcement Call
extra_world_events.description: Following the scout's report of goblin skirmishers, an urgent call for reinforcements has been posted. Adventurers are gathering to form a support party.

extra_world_events.title: Rushed Forge Repairs
extra_world_events.description: The sudden call for vanguard reinforcements has caused a severe bottleneck at the forge, with several adventurers arguing over priority for last-minute weapon repairs.

extra_world_events.title: Overheard Goblin Rumor
extra_world_events.description: A nervous merchant in the tavern corner is spreading loud, exaggerated rumors about a massive goblin boss, deeply unsettling the newer guild members waiting for deployment.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Incantation Retrieval
extra_world_events.description: The remote analysis revealed the seal's nature. Scholars now urgently need a specific unbinding incantation researched in the Arcane Library to transmit to the ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol: Reinforcement Briefing
extra_world_events.description: The newly formed reinforcement party gathers at the strategy table to finalize their tactical approach and review the scout's map before marching out.

extra_world_events.title: Allergic Reaction to Ancient Dust
extra_world_events.description: While searching for the unbinding incantation, a novice disturbed a highly magical, dusty grimoire, causing a sneezing fit that is accidentally casting minor light sparks.

extra_world_events.title: Overzealous Rookie Drill
extra_world_events.description: A nervous recruit, terrified by the goblin rumors, is swinging wildly at a practice dummy in the training yard, risking injury and breaking their stance.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Incantation Transmission
extra_world_events.description: The unbinding incantation has been found. Mages are now gathering at the strategy table to power the communication crystal and transmit the spell's frequency to the ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol: Reinforcement Departure
extra_world_events.description: The reinforcement party is fully briefed and lines up in the Guild Hall for final pre-combat buffs and a morale-boosting send-off before marching to the goblin skirmish lines.

extra_world_events.title: Dropped Buff Potions
extra_world_events.description: As the vanguard reinforcements line up for departure, a nervous cleric drops a crate of buff potions, causing a minor spill and delay in the Guild Hall.

extra_world_events.title: Crystal Resonance Overload
extra_world_events.description: The communication crystal at the strategy table is humming too loudly during the incantation transmission, causing headaches and disrupting nearby tacticians.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Artifact Return
extra_world_events.description: The transmitted incantation successfully shattered the ruin's seal! The expedition team has just arrived at the Guild Hall to hand over the recovered ancient artifact for inspection.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol: Victory Report
extra_world_events.description: The reinforcements routed the goblin skirmishers. A scout has rushed to the Quest Board to post the victory report, while the exhausted and injured vanguard members are being directed to the infirmary.

extra_world_events.title: Overcrowded Infirmary
extra_world_events.description: The sudden influx of wounded vanguard members has overwhelmed the infirmary staff, leading to a shortage of bandages and minor arguments over treatment priority.

extra_world_events.title: Sparking Artifact
extra_world_events.description: The newly recovered ancient artifact is sporadically emitting harmless but startling magical sparks in the Guild Hall, causing a mix of awe and anxiety among the gathered adventurers.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Artifact Analysis
extra_world_events.description: The sparking artifact has been moved to the Arcane Library, where scholars and mages are preparing a containment field to safely study its ancient properties.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol: Victory Celebration
extra_world_events.description: With the wounded stabilized, the uninjured vanguard members gather in the Tavern Corner to celebrate their victory and share tales of the goblin skirmish.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Holographic Map Unlocked
extra_world_events.description: The containment field stabilized the artifact, projecting an ancient holographic map of a hidden vault. Tacticians are now gathering at the strategy table to inspect the new coordinates.

extra_world_events.title: Vanguard Patrol: Battered Gear Overhaul
extra_world_events.description: With the celebration winding down, the vanguard members have dumped their heavily damaged weapons and armor at the Forge Workshop, requiring immediate and extensive repairs.

extra_world_events.title: Scattered Translation Notes
extra_world_events.description: In the rush to view the new holographic map, scholars knocked over a stack of translation notes in the Arcane Library, leaving crucial spellwork references scattered across the floor.

extra_world_events.title: Depleted Repair Supplies
extra_world_events.description: The massive influx of broken vanguard gear has completely drained the local forge reserves. Apprentices are frantically searching the Supply Warehouse for spare ingots and whetstones.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Vault Party Formed
extra_world_events.description: With the holographic map's coordinates verified, a new expedition party is being actively recruited at the Quest Board to explore the ancient hidden vault.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Reprisal: Scouting Lead Posted
extra_world_events.description: Following the vanguard's victory and gear repairs, Mira is organizing a rapid-response scouting team in the Guild Hall to track the retreating goblins back to their main camp.

extra_world_events.title: Eager Novice Dispute
extra_world_events.description: Two rival novice parties are arguing loudly at the Quest Board over who gets to join the new vault expedition, blocking access to the postings.

extra_world_events.title: Spilled Scouting Rations
extra_world_events.description: A nervous scout tripped in the Training Yard, spilling a large crate of travel rations meant for the goblin tracking mission across the dirt.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Vault Party Departure
extra_world_events.description: The expedition party has gathered at the Supply Warehouse to receive their specialized delving gear and final arcane buffs before departing for the hidden vault.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Reprisal: Scouts Returned
extra_world_events.description: The rapid-response scouts have returned to the Strategy Table, exhausted but bearing detailed maps of the goblin main camp's defenses.

extra_world_events.title: Forgotten Delving Gear
extra_world_events.description: A member of the departing vault expedition accidentally left their specialized climbing harness in the Tavern Corner, causing a minor panic before departure.

extra_world_events.title: Infirmary Triage Friction
extra_world_events.description: A mild argument has broken out in the Infirmary as returning scouts and bruised novices from the Training Yard both demand immediate healing salves.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Expedition: Initial Artifact Handoff
extra_world_events.description: A swift messenger from the vault expedition has rushed into the Arcane Library, delivering a sealed, humming artifact for immediate spellwork analysis.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Reprisal: Strike Team Formation
extra_world_events.description: Using the newly drawn maps from the scouts, Mira is officially forming the vanguard strike team in the Guild Hall to dismantle the goblin camp.

extra_world_events.title: Strange Mana Resonance
extra_world_events.description: The newly delivered vault artifact is emitting pulses of energy in the Arcane Library, causing nearby spellbooks to float and flutter chaotically.

extra_world_events.title: Shattered Practice Dummy
extra_world_events.description: An overly eager adventurer hoping to join the goblin strike team has completely shattered a practice dummy in the Training Yard, leaving a mess of straw and wood.
